primary_sources.relevance: Official CPT codes for nephrology procedures including biopsies, catheter placements, and consultations

primary_sources.relevance: Official coding guidelines for CKD staging, ESRD, and nephrology-related complications

primary_sources.relevance: Comprehensive billing procedures for dialysis facilities and outpatient nephrology services

secondary_sources.relevance: Professional society guidance on nephrology practice management and billing best practices
